tagline: Leading anti-aging franchise with membership-based recurring revenue operating in an $85B global market with no medical background required.
description_short: 4Ever Young is an owner-operated anti-aging and wellness franchise where franchisees manage a team delivering injectables, HRT, IV therapy, and medical weight loss under a recurring membership model. Franchisees operate under Corporate Practice of Medicine statutes with a Medical Director providing clinical oversight, requiring no healthcare background. With SBA-eligible investment of $521K-$754K and mature centers reporting $2M-$3M in annual revenue, this brand suits executive operators seeking high-growth recurring revenue.
market_intelligence_insight: Global anti-aging market valued at $85B in 2025, projected to reach $127-149B by 2031-2035 at 5-7% CAGR; GLP-1 weight loss drug market projected at $150B by 2035; North America leads with 37-40% market share; medspa industry growing 14%+ CAGR through 2030.
item_19_headline: Average year-one revenue of $752K with mature centers reporting $2M-$3M in annual gross revenue.
ongoing_support: weekly coaching calls,online education portal,field visits,marketing support,real estate and site selection,annual conference,vendor management,technology platform
